== Notes for [[Item:Q104494|Q104494]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:QJ8Y-1Z97 : 28 July 2015), Antonio de Caravajal in entry for Ysabel de Caravajal de Tapia, 1539. ... Name: '''Ysabel de Caravajal de Tapia'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''Aug 1539'''; Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano, Centro, Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Female; Father's Name: Antonio de Caravajal; Mother's Name: Ysabel de Tapia

See a '''photograph of Isabel's original Baptism Record''' in her profile's "Media/Documents" section.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000067383139937

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
